sub0.label: Texture.sub0 — broadly active, anomaly-leaning
sub0.interpretation: A rarely selected sub-expert within Texture that activates 23pp more on Anomaly frames — likely detects unusual texture patterns.

sub1.label: Texture.sub1 — highly specific, anomaly-biased
sub1.interpretation: A dominant sub-expert within Texture that activates 53pp more on Anomaly frames — likely detects unusual texture patterns.

sub2.label: Texture.sub2 — broadly active, class-neutral
sub2.interpretation: A rarely selected sub-expert within Texture that activates equally for both classes — captures class-invariant patterns.

sub0.label: Structure.sub0 — broadly active, anomaly-biased
sub0.interpretation: A rarely selected sub-expert within Structure that activates 83pp more on Anomaly frames — likely detects unusual structure patterns.

sub1.label: Structure.sub1 — moderately active, normal-leaning
sub1.interpretation: A co-active sub-expert within Structure that primarily activates on Normal frames — likely captures regular structure patterns.

sub2.label: Structure.sub2 — broadly active, anomaly-biased
sub2.interpretation: A rarely selected sub-expert within Structure that activates 83pp more on Anomaly frames — likely detects unusual structure patterns.

sub0.label: Context.sub0 — broadly active, anomaly-biased
sub0.interpretation: A rarely selected sub-expert within Context that activates 38pp more on Anomaly frames — likely detects unusual context patterns.

sub1.label: Context.sub1 — highly specific, normal-leaning
sub1.interpretation: A dominant sub-expert within Context that primarily activates on Normal frames — likely captures regular context patterns.

sub2.label: Context.sub2 — broadly active, anomaly-biased
sub2.interpretation: A rarely selected sub-expert within Context that activates 83pp more on Anomaly frames — likely detects unusual context patterns.

sub0.label: Semantic.sub0 — highly specific, normal-leaning
sub0.interpretation: A dominant sub-expert within Semantic that primarily activates on Normal frames — likely captures regular semantic patterns.

sub1.label: Semantic.sub1 — broadly active, anomaly-biased
sub1.interpretation: A rarely selected sub-expert within Semantic that activates 83pp more on Anomaly frames — likely detects unusual semantic patterns.

sub2.label: Semantic.sub2 — broadly active, normal-leaning
sub2.interpretation: A rarely selected sub-expert within Semantic that slightly anomaly-biased (+8pp) — may respond to borderline semantic irregularities.
